g.text: A curated, standardized, and benchmarked compendium of regulatory genomic datasets for T2D research.
regularDB is an R package that systematically curates and provides programmatic
access to public regulatory genomics databases relevant to Type 2 Diabetes (T2D).
Uses a multi-LLM benchmarking approach to identify, validate, and score databases.
Direct instruction with output format constraints
Identifying databases absent from a known seed list
├── ATACseq_DBs/ # Raw LLM outputs (3 runs × 6 models)
Query curated databases by assay type, tissue, or disease
Retrieve standardized metadata for any listed database
Score database quality across QC, accessibility, and annotation
Bha, H. et al. (2026). regularDB: A curated compendium of regulatory genomic datasets for T2D research. In preparation.
